perturbed_task_language: Pick the ketchup and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Object-suite P1: instruction names ketchup as the target object among 3 tall bottles (ketchup / bbq_sauce / salad_dressing) on the table.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may pick the wrong red-bodied bottle (bbq_sauce sitting close to the robot) because two bottles look similar in agentview.
strategy_notes: Localized scene via image_cam_00.png + world_00.npy: 3 tall objects with depth z up to ~0.114-0.149 corresponded to the three bottles. Two red-bodied tall bottles found by strong-red mask: cluster A at world (-0.13, +0.07, top z=0.149) behind/under robot arm (pixel rows 105-127, cols 140-150) and cluster B at world (+0.05, -0.10, top z=0.114) front-center (rows 128-136, cols 96-100); third tall bottle (dark-green/black body, world (+0.10, -0.20, top z=0.149), rows 148, col 64). Basket interior centered at world (+0.01, +0.26, floor z~0.10, rim z~0.137) localized from gray-fabric mask. Attempt 1 picked cluster B (front bottle) — Pi0 with pre-pos + full task language gripped cleanly (min_gripper_opening=0.0367) and dropped into basket, but libero_terminated stayed False — that bottle was bbq_sauce, not ketchup. Attempt 2 picked cluster A (back bottle) — Pi0 picked but auto-carried sideways and dropped past the basket back-rim (final bottle xy=+0.0,+0.4, outside basket). Attempt 3 (success): reset, pre-pos at world (-0.13, +0.07, z=0.20) over cluster A, pi0_pick 'pick up the ketchup' (lift_thresh=0.08, max_chunks=15) grasped the back bottle (peak_lift_m=0.169, gripper=0.034), set_gripper +1 firmed grip, move_to (0.0, +0.26, +0.30) carried to basket center, release at z=0.30 — bottle dropped cleanly inside basket and libero_terminated fired immediately. Conclusion: ketchup_1 = cluster A (back/under-arm bottle, world x~-0.13, y~+0.07); bbq_sauce_1 = cluster B (front-center, world x~+0.05, y~-0.10).
